Hello, I am

Argya Aulia Fauzandika

Mobile Developer (Flutter)

I build mobile products with a focus on thoughtful Flutter architecture, smooth UX, and maintainable code that can grow with the team.

Bandung, Indonesia
Download CV GitHub LinkedIn Play Store

01 // about

Mobile systems, thoughtful screens, clean delivery.

A compact profile built for recruiters, collaborators, and product teams.

I'm a Mobile Engineer who has been building apps with Flutter since 2021. I care a lot about how an app works under the hood, so I rely on Clean Architecture and modularization with Melos to keep the codebase neat, scalable, and easy to maintain.

I'm also big on AI-driven development. AI tools are part of my daily coding workflow because they help me solve problems faster, write better code, and speed up the overall development process.

While mobile is my main focus, I'm also enthusiastic about backend development, especially building containerized environments with Docker. Whether I need to take full ownership as a solo developer or collaborate with a team, I'm ready to build great software.

[ strengths ]

  • Flutter engineering since 2021
  • Clean Architecture and Melos modularization
  • AI-driven development workflow
  • Backend mindset with Docker-based environments

02 // selected work

Selected work.

Manual curation for projects worth highlighting first.

Featured Projects

Projects I want visitors to notice first.

Mar 2026 - Apr 2026

OtoLog

OtoLog adalah aplikasi mobile Flutter untuk membantu pemilik kendaraan mencatat riwayat servis, memantau biaya perawatan, dan mengelola beberapa kendaraan dalam satu aplikasi. Project ini dibuat untuk menghadirkan pencatatan maintenance yang lebih rapi, mudah dicari, dan tetap bisa digunakan secara lokal tanpa bergantung pada backend.

Flutter / flutter_bloc (Cubit) / Drift + SQLite Agu 2025 - Sep 2025

Litbang AU App

Litbang AU App adalah aplikasi Flutter internal untuk mendukung distribusi, tindak lanjut, persetujuan, dan pelacakan dokumen antarrole di lingkungan Litbang AU.

Flutter / Dart / flutter_bloc
